rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft,

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Opening Instructions and Prayer
Prayer of Jonah
Prayer of Daniel
Prayer of Isaiah
Prayer for the Departed
The Prayer of Athanasius for the Passing of the Soul
Prayer for Covering the Dead at the time of Death, በእንተ፡ ክድነተ፡ በድን፡ በእንተ፡ ሥጋሁ፡ ለበድን።
Prayer of Our Lady Mary, ጸሎት፡ ዘእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡
The Book that Came from Jerusalem, መጽሐፍ፡ ዘወፅአት፡ እምኢየሩሳሌም፡
Funeral Ritual for Faithful Fathers, ግንዘት፡ ዘአበው፡ መሐይምናን፡
Funeral Ritual for Children, ግንዘት፡ ዘሕፃናት፡
Funeral Ritual for Women, ግንዘት፡ ዘዓበይት፡ አንስት፡
Funeral Ritual for Girls, ግንዘት፡ ዘአዋልድ፡ አንስት፡
Funeral Ritual for Nuns, ግንዘት፡ ዘመነኮሳይያት፡
Funeral Ritual for Priests, በስመ፡ አብ፡ አርእስተ፡ ምንባብ፡ ላዕለ፡ ሙታን፡ በእንተ፡ እለ፡ ኖሙ፡ ካህናት፡
Funeral Processional with Seven Stations, ወእምዝ[፡] ታነሥኦ፡ ለምውት፡ ወታዓርፎ፡ ወትብል፡
Station One
Station Two
Station Three
Station Four
Station Five
Station Six
Station Seven
Funeral Ritual for Deacons, ግንዘት፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ ላዕለ፡ ዲያቆናት፡
Funeral Ritual for Monks, ግንዘት፡ ዘመነኮሳት፡
Funeral Ritual for Burial, ግንዘት፡ ዘግብዓተ፡ መሬት፡
Funeral Ritual for when you arrive at the Place of Burial, ወአብጺሐከ፡ ኀበ፡ መቃብሩ፡ ታበውፆ፡ ወታሰክቦ፡ ወይግበሩ፡ ኀበ፡ በድነ፡ ሥጋሁ፡
Funeral Ritual for Entombment, ግንዘት፡ በእንተ፡ ግብዓተ፡ መሬት፡
Homily of Abba Sälama, Bishop of Ethiopia, to be read for all the Dead
Prayer of Matthew, ጸሎተ፡ ማቴዎስ፡
Supplication for the Departed, እግዚአ፡ ህያዋን፡
Prayer of Penitence, ጸሎተ፡ ንስሐ፡
Homily from One of the Brothers, ዜና፡ መፍትው፡ እምአኃው፡
Prayer of Penitence, ጸሎተ፡ ንስሐ፡
Seven Benedictions of Abba Samuel, ጸሎተ፡ ቡራኬ፡ ዘአቡነ፡ ሳሙኤል፡
Benediction, ጸሎተ፡ ቡራኬ፡
Rituals in Memory of the Dead, ግንዘት፡ በእንተ፡ ተዝካረ፡ ሙታን፡
Funeral Ritual for the First Day (after the Death), ግንዘት፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በዕለት፡
Funeral Ritual for the Third Day (after the Death), ግንዘት፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በሣልስት፡ ዕለት፡
Funeral Ritual for the Seventh Day (after the Death), ግንዘት፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በ፯ዕለት፡
Funeral Ritual for the Twelfth Day (after the Death), ግንዘት፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ አመ[፡] ፲ወ፪ ዕለት፡
Funeral Ritual for the Thirtieth Day (after the Death), ግንዘት፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ አመ፡ ፴ ዕለት፡
Funeral Ritual for the Fortieth, Sixtieth, Eightieth Day, Half a year, and a year, and all the memory of the Dead, ግንዘት፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በ፵ ዕለት፡ ወበ፷ ዕለት፡ ወበ፹፡ በመንፈቅ፡ ወበዓመት፡ ወበኵሉ፡ ተዝካረ፡ ሙታን
A Second Prayer of Our Lady Mary, ካልዕ፡ ጸሎት፡ ዘእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡
Homily of Jacob of Sǝrug for Departed Priests and Deacons, ድርሳን፡ ዘብፁዕ፡ ወቅዱስ፡ ያዕቆብ፡ ዘሥሩግ፡
